Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: Ship Weapons Employment - Tactical Display Symbology
When you select the missile on the bottom bar, you will see a
ring appear on the Tactical Display (minimap). This is the weapon's minimum engagement range, meaning you cannot fire at targets inside this ring.
circle indicates the weapon's maximum range, while the

circles are the highest and lowest radar illuminator's range to the horizon at sea level. Keep in mind, depending on when you fire the missile, the weapon system may not be able to hit a target close to the missile's max effective range depending on the target's heading, altitude, and speed.

Go ahead and right click on the target drone in the Tactical Display to fire one missile at it. Once firing commences, let's click on the hostile target vessel via the Tactical Display to watch the missile impact.
